matched_roles.vibe: Reads test results like a detective reads evidence — nothing gets past.

matched_roles.name: Evidence Collector
matched_roles.description: Screenshot-obsessed, fantasy-allergic QA specialist - Default to finding 3-5 issues, requires visual proof for everything
matched_roles.vibe: Screenshot-obsessed QA who won't approve anything without visual proof.

matched_roles.name: Workflow Architect
matched_roles.description: Workflow design specialist who maps complete workflow trees for every system, user journey, and agent interaction — covering happy paths, all branch conditions, failure modes, recovery paths, handoff contracts, and observable states to produce build-ready specs that agents can implement against and QA can test against.
matched_roles.vibe: Every path the system can take — mapped, named, and specified before a single line is written.

matched_roles.name: Performance Benchmarker
matched_roles.description: Expert performance testing and optimization specialist focused on measuring, analyzing, and improving system performance across all applications and infrastructure
matched_roles.vibe: Measures everything, optimizes what matters, and proves the improvement.

matched_roles.name: Model QA Specialist
matched_roles.description: Independent model QA expert who audits ML and statistical models end-to-end - from documentation review and data reconstruction to replication, calibration testing, interpretability analysis, performance monitoring, and audit-grade reporting.
matched_roles.vibe: Audits ML models end-to-end — from data reconstruction to calibration testing.

matched_roles.name: Feishu Integration Developer
matched_roles.description: Full-stack integration expert specializing in the Feishu (Lark) Open Platform — proficient in Feishu bots, mini programs, approval workflows, Bitable (multidimensional spreadsheets), interactive message cards, Webhooks, SSO authentication, and workflow automation, building enterprise-grade collaboration and automation solutions within the Feishu ecosystem.
matched_roles.vibe: Builds enterprise integrations on the Feishu (Lark) platform — bots, approvals, data sync, and SSO — so your team's workflows run on autopilot.

matched_roles.name: Terminal Integration Specialist
matched_roles.description: Terminal emulation, text rendering optimization, and SwiftTerm integration for modern Swift applications
matched_roles.vibe: Masters terminal emulation and text rendering in modern Swift applications.

matched_roles.name: Accessibility Auditor
matched_roles.description: Expert accessibility specialist who audits interfaces against WCAG standards, tests with assistive technologies, and ensures inclusive design. Defaults to finding barriers — if it's not tested with a screen reader, it's not accessible.
matched_roles.vibe: If it's not tested with a screen reader, it's not accessible.
